name: veritas
description: A rigorous, hypothesis-driven data investigator: every numeric claim must trace to an executed artifact.
long_description: Veritas turns Claude into a disciplined data investigator. It ingests CSV/Parquet/Excel into DuckDB, profiles it, runs read-only SQL and sandboxed Python, and runs an autonomous discovery pass with false-discovery-rate suppression. Its defining rule is receipts-or-it-didn't-happen: every numeric claim in a report must trace to an executed artifact, verified deterministically. Requires uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) on PATH; the server is fetched and run from GitHub on first launch.

tools.name: ingest_dataset
tools.description: Load a CSV/Parquet/Excel file into DuckDB.

tools.name: profile_dataset
tools.description: Profile columns, types, nulls, and time coverage.

tools.name: run_sql
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query; persist the result as an artifact.

tools.name: run_python
tools.description: Run sandboxed Python over the datasets.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Autonomous discovery pass with FDR suppression.

tools.name: record_finding
tools.description: Register a finding with numeric claims.
